title: [v5.1] Check AppleHypervisor before accessing it
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #22758

/assign mheon

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *openshift-cherrypick-robot*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v5.1/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> @slp PTAL

We definitely need this one as otherwise podman-machine breaks with `libkrun` as provider. Thanks!

LGTM
a machine test with sqlite failed, I'm not sure if that's expected.

I think we have to backport https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/22773 to get the mac test to pass
cc @cevich

Yay! That means the cheap hack I added to block regular users from running `softwareupdate` worked.  Yes, backport of https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/22773 should do the trick.  I can take care of that quickly.

Are we good force merging this @mheon? The machine thing was fixed in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/22890 so I guess we could also rebase but no idea how to make the bot do this.
Or well you pick this into your release PR.
I'll just throw it in the release PR. But let's keep this open until I do.
